title: Moderation Queue Update — 2026-04-28
body:
The following actions were taken after reviewing the abuse queue:

BANS (2):
- spam_wave_42: Permanently banned for distributing phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes. Zero tolerance for phishing.
- toxic_runner: Permanently banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

WARNINGS (2):
- new_member_17: Warned for off-topic posting in #introductions. Please review our community guidelines.
- bot_like_user_77: Warned for suspicious repeated near-identical replies in help channels. Genuine, varied engagement is expected.

CLOSED WITHOUT ACTION (2):
- report_003 (trusted_helper): Report reviewed; arose from a moderation disagreement. No policy violation found. Closed.
- report_006 (core_maintainer): Confirmed false positive; report was part of a coordinated brigading attempt following a legitimate moderation decision. Closed.

All 6 reports have been resolved. If you have concerns about any of these decisions, please contact the moderation team directly.

— Community Moderation Team
